mapper.sql: SELECT p.payment_id, p.contract_id, p.fee_type, p.fee_name, p.period_start, p.period_end, p.amount_due, p.amount_paid, p.pay_deadline, p.pay_time, CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '1' THEN '1' WHEN p.pay_status = '3' THEN '3' WHEN p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN '2' ELSE COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') END AS pay_status, p.remind_status, p.remind_time, p.remark, p.park_id, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, c.contract_no, c.customer_name FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id

if.test: payment != null and payment.feeType != null and payment.feeType != ''
payment != null and payment.payStatus != null and payment.payStatus != ''
payment != null and payment.contractNo != null and payment.contractNo != ''
payment != null and payment.customerName != null and payment.customerName != ''

mapper.select:
AND p.pay_status != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE()
ORDER BY p.pay_deadline ASC, p.payment_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') = '0' AND p.pay_deadline >= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.pay_status = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partial_count, SUM(CASE WHEN p.remind_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reminded_count, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_due), 0) AS amount_due, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_paid), 0) AS amount_paid, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_due), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount_paid), 0) AS amount_pending FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id
